common.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

brand.note: 3D tours and real room dimensions for every property, in Quebec.

tabs.aria: Sign in or create an account

register.confirmEmail: We sent you an email to confirm your account. Check it to continue.

errors.alreadyRegistered: That email is already registered. Sign in instead.
errors.emailNotConfirmed: Confirm your email before signing in.
errors.weakPassword: The password does not meet the requirements.

complete.title: Complete your profile
complete.lead: We need your phone number to publish properties and schedule scanning visits.

hero.lead: Every property includes photos, a 3D tour and the real dimensions of each room, taken from the scan itself. No surprises on move-in day.

video.title: A property, scanned in 3D.
video.lead: An example Matterport scan: walk through every room and check its real dimensions before you even visit.

one.title: Search
one.text: Filter by city, neighbourhood, type and rent across Quebec.

two.title: Tour it in 3D
two.text: Step into every room with the virtual tour and check its exact measurements.

three.title: Rent
three.text: Contact the owner and sign the lease with confidence.

scan.lead: A technician visits your property and captures a tour with Matterport. We produce the virtual tour, a floor plan and the dimensions of every room. Your listing rents faster.

one.text: I rented without visiting five times. The 3D tour showed me every corner before I decided.
one.name: Marie-Ève T.

two.text: I listed my condo in Laval and the scan was done in one morning. It rented in two weeks.
two.name: David R.

three.text: The exact dimensions saved me from moving furniture that wouldn't fit. Simple and honest.
three.name: Sophie L.

cta.title: Find your next home in Quebec.

notice.completePhone: Add your phone number so you can publish properties.

list.emptySub: Adjust the filters or widen the search area.

photos.dropNote: JPG, PNG or WebP · max. {{mb}} MB per photo · up to {{max}} photos
photos.full: You've reached the maximum of {{max}} photos.
photos.count: {{count}} of {{max}} · the first photo is the cover image.

rejected.type: “{{name}}”: unsupported format (use JPG, PNG or WebP).
rejected.max: “{{name}}”: you would exceed the maximum of {{max}} photos.

form.title: New property
form.lead: Register a property to list it for rent.

contact.title: Contact details
contact.lead: Pre-filled from your profile — change them if needed.

details.title: Details
details.lead: Dimensions are filled in by the 3D scan; you can leave them empty.

fields.title: Title
fields.unitNote: Optional. It will be combined: 5-123 Main St.

location.title: Property location
location.lead: Where will the assessment visit take place?

gps.title: GPS coordinates
gps.lead: To show the location on the map.
gps.incomplete: Fill in street, city and postal code to look up the coordinates.
gps.notFound: We couldn't find that address. You can enter the coordinates by hand.
gps.failed: The lookup failed. Enter the coordinates by hand.

photos.title: Photos
photos.lead: Optional. They are uploaded when you register the property; the first one is the cover image.
photos.editLead: Add or remove photos. The first one is the cover image.

scan.title: Request a 3D scan
scan.lead: A technician visits the property and captures the tour with Matterport.

form.error: The property could not be registered. Please try again.
form.photoError: The property was registered, but the photos could not be uploaded. Add them later from the listing.

success.title: Your file is open.
success.lead: Keep this number: it identifies all the information about your property.
success.scanRequested: We'll contact you to schedule the 3D scanning visit.

form.photoDeleteError: Could not delete the photo. Please try again.

state.title: File and status
state.lead: The status determines whether the property appears in searches.
state.expedienteNote: Generated by the system. Not editable.

detail.noScan: This property doesn't have a 3D scan yet.

dimensions.title: Dimensions
dimensions.empty: The dimensions of this property haven't been recorded yet.

scanner.title: Scanner dashboard
scanner.heading: Assigned scans
scanner.lead: Record the 3D tour and the dimensions after each visit.
scanner.emptyText: When an administrator assigns you a visit, it will appear here.

tour.label: 3D tour (Matterport)
tour.note: In Matterport: Share → Embed. Paste the model URL here. You can add several.

scanner.saved: Saved. It's now on the listing.

errors.tourHost: The link must be from Matterport, Kuula or Polycam.
errors.save: Could not save. Please try again.
errors.deletePhoto: Could not delete the photo. Please try again.

scans.title: Scan requests
scans.lead: Assign a scanner to each visit.

errors.load: The data could not be loaded.
errors.assign: The scanner could not be assigned.
errors.schedule: The visit could not be scheduled.
errors.role: The role could not be changed.
